content:
INTELLIGENCE BRIEFING — Thu, 19 Feb 2026 16:36:57 GMT
Overall Threat Level: CRITICAL
Total Events: 320 | Critical: 27 | High: 52 | Medium: 195 | Low: 46

CRITICAL ALERTS:
  [MIDDLE EAST] Donald Trump repeats call for Iran to end nuclear program as world leaders gather for first Board of Peace meeting - US politics live (Guardian Middle East)
  [MIDDLE EAST] Trump praises ‘magnificent’ B-2 bombers that struck Iran in 2025 (Al Jazeera)
  [GLOBAL] South Korean Ex-Leader Is Sentenced to Life in Prison (NYT World)
  [MILITARY] China’s nuclear submarine production rate surpasses that of US: Report (Breaking Defense)
  [MIDDLE EAST] Amid tensions, Ukraine’s Chernobyl site remains part of a war zone (Al Jazeera)

REGIONAL ASSESSMENT:
  Middle East (76 events, 5 critical, 5 high):
    - Former PM Naftali Bennett won't boycott Ben Gvir or Smotrich, leaked recordings reveal
    - Donald Trump repeats call for Iran to end nuclear program as world leaders gather for first Board of Peace meeting - US politics live
    - Trump praises ‘magnificent’ B-2 bombers that struck Iran in 2025
  Ukraine/Russia (82 events, 10 critical, 16 high):
    - War update: 98 clashes on front lines since midnight, Pokrovsk sector hottest
    - Summary from the Russian Ministry of Defense regarding the progress of operations as of February 19, 2026: **Northern Group of Troops:** Key positions have been taken over
    - The main points from Dmitry Peskov’s statements are as follows: – The Kremlin has not yet announced where the next round of negotiations regarding Ukraine will take place
  Europe (8 events, 1 critical, 4 high):
    - ⭐ We’re used to thinking about war through news reports and statistics
    - FSSB and Telegram The director of the FSSB of Russia, Bortnikov: “At present, the FSSB is not engaged in any negotiations with the founder of Telegram, Pavel Durov
    - In Moscow, at the Bitcevsky Park metro station, a technical malfunction occurred at 8:46 a
  Global (78 events, 3 critical, 14 high):
    - Trump says he will decide in next 10 days if US will strike Iran
    - South Korean Ex-Leader Is Sentenced to Life in Prison
    - The British police detained Prince Andrew

Sources: Jerusalem Post, GDELT, Guardian Middle East, NYT World, Ukrinform, Guardian Ukraine, BBC World, Defense One, Financial Times, Al Jazeera, Times of Israel, Long War Journal, SCMP, Defense News, Military Times, NYT Middle East, Ukrainska Pravda, Breaking Defense, USNI News, Washington Post World, Foreign Policy, Colonelcassad [tg:ru_milblog], Two Majors [tg:ru_milblog], Readovka [tg:ru_milblog], ASTRA Independent [tg:ru_milblog], CIG Telegram [tg:iran_milblog], Operatyvnyi ZSU [tg:ua_osint], RV Voenkor [tg:ru_milblog], Google News Reuters World, Abu Ali Express (EN) [tg:israel_milblog], Defence Blog, War on the Rocks, MilInfoLive [tg:ru_milblog], Turned on War [tg:ru_milblog], Google News Reuters ME, Bellingcat, Google News Kyiv Independent, Azov Brigade [tg:ua_frontline], Kraken Z [tg:ru_milblog], SBU Security Service [tg:ua_intel], WarGonzo [tg:ru_milblog], Google News Reuters Africa, Google News Reuters Ukraine, Rybar [tg:ru_milblog], The Diplomat, DoD News, TFR/Airspace Closure News, The War Zone, Supernova+ [tg:ua_osint], Google News Middle East, Voenkor Kotenok [tg:ru_milblog]
